overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student in wizard robes exploring a foggy castle courtyard during golden hour. The character ascends stone stairs, passes through a doorway into a brief interior, and emerges into a sunlit courtyard populated with other students.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to castle entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up a long stone staircase toward a castle entrance flanked by stone walls

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward to the castle entrance
tall gray stone castle wall with crenellations visible at the top
arched stone doorway with wooden doors at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long outdoor stone staircase toward a castle entrance. The scene is foggy with warm golden-hour lighting, and the path is flanked by stone walls and autumn vegetation. No other people are visible in this section.

events.description: character enters the castle through a heavy wooden door into a dim interior
exiting the doorway into bright sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: passing through a heavy wooden doorway from the foggy exterior into a dim stone corridor and back out to a sunlit courtyard

entered.detail: large dark wooden door with metal ring handle
rough-hewn stone blocks forming the interior passage walls
thick stone door frame with archway

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a doorway transition, moving from the foggy exterior into a brief dark interior passage before emerging into bright sunlight. The heavy wooden door swings open to reveal a sunlit courtyard beyond.

events.description: emerging from doorway into open courtyard with other students visible
tiered fountain becomes visible in the center of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit courtyard past other students in wizard robes

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a stone wall near the hedge
student in red robes walking across the lawn

entered.detail: irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway
tall trimmed hedge rows lining the path
multi-tiered stone fountain visible in the distance
tall gothic spire rising above the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright sunlit courtyard, the character walks along a cobblestone path lined with hedges. Other students in robes are scattered throughout the area, some sitting on walls and others walking. A large tiered fountain and castle towers become visible in the distance.

events.description: character slows down and stops briefly near the fountain area
student on broomstick flies past from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along a path beside hedges, passing the fountain and observing other students in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: student flying on broomstick past the camera

entered.detail: ornate stone lamp post on a pedestal
grassy area with students gathered beyond the hedge

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the courtyard garden, passing closer to the tiered fountain. A student on a broomstick flies past, and the character slows to observe the surroundings. Stone lantern posts and manicured hedges line the path as the lawn area opens up to the right.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the surroundings
camera pans to reveal more students and distant castle buildings

agents.ego_description: standing still on a stone terrace observing groups of students on the lawn below and the castle architecture

notable_agents.action: group of three students standing together in black robes
students walking and gathering on the distant lawn

entered.detail: gothic castle spires and towers visible in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop on a stone terrace overlooking a lawn area. Groups of students are visible standing and walking on the grass below. The camera pans slowly to take in the view of the castle buildings and spires rising in the misty golden light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, foggy staircase into a bustling, sun-drenched castle courtyard. It begins with the character ascending a long stone staircase flanked by autumn vegetation under a warm, golden-hour haze. As the character reaches the top, the scene transitions through a dark interior passage before a heavy wooden door swings open to reveal a bright, open-air courtyard. The camera then glides along a cobblestone path lined with hedges and students in robes, passing a tiered fountain and a student flying on a broomstick. Finally, the movement slows as the character reaches a stone terrace, where the camera pans across a wide lawn populated by students toward the distant castle spires rising in the misty light.
